title: Network Media, Devices, PoE, and Diagnostic Tools
description: A renovated office combines copper, fiber, wireless, switches, routers, access points, PoE phones, injectors, patch panels, and uncertain labels, causing intermittent link and power faults. Learners cumulatively produce physical and logical network path inventory through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Match twisted pair, coaxial, fiber, connector, category, wavelength, distance, bandwidth, interference, bend, grounding, and environment to requirements.
Distinguish modem, ONT, router, switch, access point, firewall, bridge, repeater, controller, load balancer, proxy, NAS, and IoT hub roles.
Reason about source and powered-device standards, negotiation, class, per-port and total budget, cable loss, distance, fallback, and injector placement.
